summary: Code quality is solid (explicit types, pure functions, proper error handling, set -euo pipefail) but deliverable is incomplete. Workflow references non-existent fixtures/artifacts.json, package.json, and test files (tests/retention.test.ts, tests/cleanup.test.ts) — workflow will fail immediately. Minor issues: loose type coercion in parseArtifacts (src/main.ts:20-28; String/Number) lacks validation; workflow duplicates Bun install in unit-tests and integration-tests jobs (lines 13-14, 31-32); hardcoded test expectations couple workflow to fixture data. Readability is excellent (clear naming, good WHY comments). Cannot ship or test without supporting files.
